meaning: n.要素,元素,成分,元件,自然环境
examples: Cost was a key element in our decision.
Diamond is the crystalline form of the element carbon.
The kettle needs a new element.
Hooking a local tarpon or barracuda can certainly add an unexpectedly powerful element of propulsion.
The element was inscribed on the Representative List of Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in 2009.
